nodes.content: Mujahed, a cybersecurity company based in Bangalore, India, utilizes Python and JavaScript for its coding needs. CaSVeM is a solo music project, an electronic music artist creating music independently. Both Mujahed and CaSVeM operate independently, with Mujahed focusing on cybersecurity and CaSVeM on music.

Mujahed, a 24-year-old individual, has 6 years of coding experience and a strong foundation in software development. He has applied his skills in various projects, demonstrating his expertise. This showcases the potential of individuals with dedicated experience in software development.

Weaviate is being phased out in favor of Qdrant for vector search capabilities due to its performance, scalability, and documentation advantages. Qdrant's simpler API will make integration easier. CaSVeM is planned to be launched as open source in June 2026 as an alternative solution.
